docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT FOOTE, ELIZABETH
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORP.
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FOOTE, ELIZABETH $1,674.31 PRINCIPAL, $40.73 INTEREST, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,805.04 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: POLLAK, ROBERT LAWRENCE SUBSTITUTED FOR PETERS, MARK C AS ATTORNEY FOR LEASECOMM CORP.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: SHAFFER, DARREN SUBSTITUTED FOR POLLAK, ROBERT LAWRENCE AS ATTORNEY FOR LEASECOMM CORP.
PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION, WRIT MAY ISSUE ON 11/21/00.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORP.
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEASECOMM CORP. SERVED OCT-11-2000, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FOOTE, ELIZABETH
